summary: Created story-concept.json with refined premise, 3 thematic pillars (trust as structural failure, the price of the right choice, chosen versus only), genre balance (0.55 fantasy / 0.45 romance), 4 comp titles (The Jasmine Throne, The Foxglove King, The Priory of the Orange Tree, A Memory Called Empire), tone contract (morally complex / darkly romantic with dry wit), enemies-to-lovers romance arc, estimated 22 chapters at ~4,000 words each, and complete original name registry replacing all world-seed placeholders.
